raw_consumer_statement: I disputed six unauthorized transactions on my Barclaycard Ring Mastercard totaling {$2600.00}, which occurred in Michigan while I was in Washington. Barclays initially denied the claim, then partially reversed it after I filed a CFPB complaintrefunding {$1800.00} and {$440.00} in interest. However, two transactions from XX/XX/XXXX at XXXX # XXXX and XXXX # XXXX, each for {$500.00}, remain unresolved. Despite submitting a written follow-up request on XX/XX/XXXX asking for an itemized breakdown and investigation documentation, Barclays never responded. These transactions were part of my original claim and are clearly not credited on my XX/XX/XXXX statement. I am re-escalating through CFPB due to this continued non-compliance.
